semantic.role: Vitest configuration module for end-to-end (e2e) test execution.
responsibilities: Define the set of test files to be included during the e2e test run, scoped to `tests/e2e/**/*.test.ts`.
Set the per-test timeout to two minutes (120000 ms) to accommodate long-running integration flows.
Set the hook timeout to thirty seconds (30000 ms) for lifecycle hooks (e.g., beforeAll, afterAll).
outOfScope: Unit or integration test configuration, which should be in separate Vitest config files (e.g., `vitest.config.ts`).
Test execution logic, CI/CD integration, or per-environment overrides.
invariants: The configuration must remain valid per the Vitest configuration schema, especially the `test` block structure.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a dedicated, isolated configuration for running end-to-end tests with appropriate timeouts and file scope.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Updated as part of security hardening and infrastructure changes to enforce consistent e2e test boundaries and timeout policies.

publicSurface.description: The Vitest configuration object consumed by the Vitest runner to drive end-to-end test execution. Specifies include patterns and timeout values.
